series_metadata.series_description: Committee agendas, minutes, packets, handouts and other corresponding materials generated for meetings of the various committees created by the Ohio Housing Finance Agency Board.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of if not transferred. ; Electronic: Retain 2 years, then contact State Archives for review and possible transfer. Dispose of if not transferred., Paper: Archives ; Electronic: Archives
